source: Mordheim core rulebook, Part 3 - Campaigns & Optional Rules, fetched from https://www.broheim.net/downloads/rules/Mordheim%20-%20Part%203%20-%20Campaigns%20%26%20Optional%20Rules.pdf on 2026-07-03. Owner should cross-check against their own physical rulebook printing/errata. (Selling wyrdstone table, rulebook p.101). Values are total gold crown profit after warband maintenance costs are deducted, looked up by number of shards sold in one post-battle sequence and the warband's current number of warriors (Hired Swords/special characters are not counted per the Hired Swords rules). Sisters of Sigmar/Skaven/Undead warbands treat this income abstractly (piety/warp tokens/favour) per rulebook p.101 but use the same numbers.
